name: Market Link Pro Advisory

data_sources.note: Jackson Market Link Pro Suite (Market Link Pro, Market Link Pro II, Market Link Pro Advisory, Market Link Pro III). Advisory variant is the fee-based RIA distribution channel (no commission, no surrender schedule). Issued by Jackson National Life Insurance Company.

Jackson Market Link Pro Advisory III brochure (current generation). 1-, 3-, and 6-year terms; cap and trigger crediting; buffer (first loss) and floor (tail risk) protection options. Empty surrender_schedule confirmed for advisory variant.
Jackson National Life Insurance Company AM Best FSR A (Excellent), affirmed Dec 18, 2025. Long-term Issuer Credit Rating upgraded to 'a+' from 'a' Dec 2025. Synthetic 'A' confirmed.

verification_notes: AM Best A confirmed; advisory share class (no surrender) confirmed; cap and term structure verified against carrier PDF. Specific cap rate 0.105 (1-yr 10% buffer) and 0.60 (6-yr 15% buffer) retained — within publicly posted range. Note flagship Market Link Pro (non-advisory) was previously flipped to prospectus_v1 with 6-yr participation 80% rather than cap structure; advisory variant may also have shifted to participation but retained cap here as the brochure cites both methods.
